sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id UInt64, value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_numbers SELECT number, randNegativeBinomial(10, 0.5) FROM numbers(10);
UPDATE test_numbers SET value = randNegativeBinomial(20, 0.3) WHERE id % 2 = 0;
SELECT id, value, randNegativeBinomial(15, 0.6) AS random_value FROM test_numbers ORDER BY id;
DELETE FROM test_numbers WHERE value < randNegativeBinomial(5, 0.4);
